title: A Mysterious Stranger
description: As dusk settles over the road, a hooded traveler approaches without a sound. They silently hold out a small wooden box before disappearing into the fog. The box is warm to the touch.

options.title: Open the Box
options.description: Curiosity gets the better of you.

options.title: Search for the Stranger
options.description: Perhaps the box was never meant for you.

options.title: Leave It Alone
options.description: Some mysteries are better left unsolved.
